C:\Users\Mark\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WinGet\Packages\BrechtSanders.WinLibs.MCF.UCRT_Microsoft.Winget.Source_8wekyb3d8bbwe\mingw64\bin\c++.exe -O3 -DNDEBUG -static-libgcc -static-libstdc++ -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\test_core.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o test_core.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libtest_core.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\test_core.dir\linkLibs.rsp
